chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: application No.S-172 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 16.04.2026 Mr.Aroon Kumar, Advocate for the applicant Mr.Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G for State ****** Learned counsel for the applicant no longer wishes to press this Application. He is duly authorized by the Vakalatnama for such purpose. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc: Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
